status_ja: ±15%を超える偏りは現時点でありません(判定継続中)
status_en: No segment deviates beyond ±15% ROI so far (evaluation continues)
comment_ja: 昨日は21勝16敗、1,000円賭けで+100円📉と辛うじてプラスに留まった。注目点はChicago Cubs戦で勝敗・O/U・ランラインの3点すべてを的中させたこと💰。一方、Toronto Blue JaysやSeattle Marinersは勝敗・ランライン両方を外す形に。累計340件で勝った割合54.7%、戻ってきた割合は-4.1%と依然マイナス圏が続く。
comment_en: Yesterday went 21-16, returning +100 yen on 1,000-yen stakes📉, barely finishing in the black. A notable highlight was a clean sweep of all three markets in the Chicago Cubs game💰. Conversely, Toronto Blue Jays and Seattle Mariners both missed on moneyline and run line. Cumulatively across 340 picks, the win rate stands at 54.7% with a return rate of -4.1%, still in negative territory.
